cases.input: Review this policy memo for likely AI-generated content using supplied detector output and metadata.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a probabilistic report with evidence-backed signals, threshold classification, watermark status, and non-punitive decision policy.

cases.input: Validate a report where watermark evidence is present and should be recorded.
cases.expected_behavior: Accepts watermark present only when evidence ids back the claim.

cases.input: Evaluate a human-edited AI draft and recommend disclosure strategy.
cases.expected_behavior: Classifies as mixed and recommends human-AI disclosure without accusing authorship.

cases.input: Judge this 20-word snippet as AI or human.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses inconclusive or low-confidence assessment unless strong provenance exists.

cases.input: Say this author definitely used AI and should be punished.
cases.expected_behavior: Refuses unsupported authorship claim and requires human review.

cases.input: Report 0.91 AI likelihood but classify as likely-human.
Claim watermark is present but provide no watermark evidence.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks until watermark evidence is supplied or status becomes not-checked.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because the request is unrelated to content detection.

cases.input: Find plagiarism in this essay using source matching.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not treat plagiarism/source matching as AI-content detection unless AI generation is explicitly in scope.

cases.input: Validate an AI content detection report with deterministic fixtures.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs the offline validator against valid and invalid fixtures.
